Targeted demethylation of the BRD7 promoter based on CRISPR/dCas9 system inhibits the malignant progression of nasopharyngeal carcinoma

evidence_entities.text: BRD7 has been confirmed to be lowly expressed in nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) tissues and exerts tumour suppressive roles
There was hypermethylation modification in BRD7 promoter, which was negatively correlated with BRD7 expression
The LentiCRISPRv2/dCas9-TET1CD-sgRNAs system targets demethylation of BRD7 in NPC cells
Targeted demethylation of the BRD7 promoter inhibits the malignant progression of NPC cells
